Right by the bridge, you have to walk out onto the street to get to the blackberries. Sweet and delicious! Falling Fruit season: June-July.
2900 Horse Shoe Farm Rd, Wake Forest, NC 27587, USA

Large bramble of bushes, and a few more further down the path around the corner. Beautiful, sweet fruit. A little hard to get to- bring your gear and wear gloves! Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
